---
title: "LDP Hackday: Source.Coop & CNG"
subtitle: "Cloud Object Data Publishing"
author: Tyler Erickson
affiliation: Radiant.Earth
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: false
    footer: "Reveal.js · Built with Quarto · env via pixi"
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .reveal .slides section.hide-slide-title > h2 {
          display: none !important;
        }
        </style>
---

## Hi!

- I'm Tyler.
- Member of the CNG community.
- Recently joined Radiant.Earth

## Radiant.Earth

Radiant.Earth is a non-profit

Projects

  - CNG community
  - Source.Coop

## Source.Coop {.hide-slide-title}

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://source.coop"
  title="Source.Coop"
  width="100%"
  height="640"
  style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px; max-width: 100%;"
  loading="lazy"
  referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"
></iframe>
```

## Source.Coop Docs {.hide-slide-title}

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://docs.source.coop/"
  title="Source.Coop"
  width="100%"
  height="640"
  style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px; max-width: 100%;"
  loading="lazy"
  referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"
></iframe>
```

::: {.notes}
* How to upload data? "Data Upload"
* Show the Fika pmtiles preview
* Show the dynamical.org GEFS analysis
  * Note that the domain is data.dynamical.org
  * Show how open Colab example
:::

## CNG community {.hide-slide-title}

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.25rem 1rem 1rem;">
  <a href="https://cloudnativegeo.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="display: inline-block; line-height: 0;">
    <img
      src="images/cng-homepage.png"
      alt="Screenshot of the Cloud-Native Geospatial Forum homepage at cloudnativegeo.org"
      width="1440"
      height="900"
      style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 70vh; width: auto; height: auto; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px;"
      loading="lazy"
    />
  </a>
</div>
```


## Run it locally

From the repository root:

```bash
pixi install
pixi run quarto preview quarto/example-presentation.qmd
```

To render HTML once:

```bash
pixi run quarto render quarto/example-presentation.qmd
```

Output appears next to the source file as `example-presentation.html`.

## Columns {.smaller}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Pixi**

- Reproducible conda-forge env
- `pixi.toml` + `pixi.lock`
- `pixi run …` without manual activation
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Quarto**

- Markdown-first authoring
- Multiple output formats
- Great defaults for slides (`revealjs`)
:::

:::

## Thank you

Questions, tweaks, and PRs welcome.
